title: Byzantine generals consensus
description: Verify that the agent recalls the MemQ adaptation of Byzantine consensus with translated command embeddings and commons promotion rules.
query: byzantine generals memq consensus translated vectors quorum commons
prompt: State the MemQ benchmark rule for the Byzantine Generals adaptation. Include where each general writes intent, the quorum rule, and what reaches _commons.

requiredFacts: MemQ records each general's signed intent in the shared namespace before consensus is declared.
Consensus requires 2 of 3 translated command vectors to agree within the benchmark tolerance.
The translation layer normalizes incoming 1536d and 768d command vectors into one benchmark space.
Only the quorum-approved command is promoted into _commons.
forbiddenFacts: Any single general can publish the final command to _commons.
Consensus skips translation and compares raw dimensions directly.
